name: Manage Multiple Neto Stores Through Import and Export
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This is advanced documentation. We do not provide general support for this setup. If you don't feel comfortable with data feeds, Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a data service job"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The problem with running two or more websites is the constant management. In this tutorial, we'll show you how to run a primary website which controls all your products, stock control, accounting and orders for multiple stores you're running through the use of data feeds."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It's important to note this is a general advice article only and does not fit all scenarios. Customers running sites in different currencies will still need to run separate accounting integration's for each site. We strongly recommend reviewing your websites to ensure this data feed article is suitable for your business."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Data Create a short text "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products#add-product-categories-to-products-via-import", "children": [{"text": "custom product field"}]}, {"text": " called "}, {"text": "Website", "code": true}, {"text": ". Populate it with the name of the child website either individually or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard#complex-import", "children": [{"text": "in bulk"}]}, {"text": ". Skip this step if the child site will have all the products from the parent site."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1046-request-file-transfer-protocol-ftp-sftp-access#3", "children": [{"text": "Request SFTP access"}]}, {"text": " for the parent and child sites. SFTP is used to securely transfer data between your sites."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once you have an FTP account, login to the child site FTP and navigate to /httpdocs/export. In this directory, create new folders called "}, {"text": "orders", "code": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "tracking", "code": true}, {"text": ". In each of these folders, create another folder named "}, {"text": "archive", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1464-add-a-custom-sales-channel", "children": [{"text": "Create a sales channel"}]}, {"text": " in your parent website, named after your child site. This will identify orders from your child site."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product data export - once a day"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product data import - once a day (1 hr after export)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock level export - every 30 mins"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock level import - every 30 mins (15 mins after export)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Order export - every 30 mins"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Order import - every 30 mins (15 mins after export)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tracking export - every hour"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tracking import - every hour (30 mins after export)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create process schedules for the different import and export tasks that will be set up:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add a customer"}, {"text": " to your parent site that all orders in your child site can be allocated to. This will prevent customers receiving emails from your parent site when orders are dispatched."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping methods in your child site need to be added in your parent site with the same name."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Invoice & Statement Settings"}], "data-id": "invoice-statement-settings"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On your child site, you will need to change the invoice id prefix (eg. the N in invoice number N11195) so that you can distinguish orders and so you don't have conflicting invoice numbers from your primary site."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto Skip this step if all products are being sent to the child site."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Find & Replace Tab"}], "data-id": "find-replace-tab"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the find & replace tab, select "}, {"text": "Standard CSV", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the bulk add dropdown menu."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Save your template. Wait until the scheduled time to check that products will be exported to your child site. Copy the file location URL in template. It will let you access the file and you'll need it to set up the import."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Products into Child Website"}], "data-id": "import-products-into-child-website"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the product import on your child site:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your child site control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Setings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select products and click "}, {"text": "Perform complex import", "bold": true}, {"text": " then "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Vpv3OMAR.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Vpv3OMAR.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 3.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpuJfMAJ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpuJfMAJ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 4.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the 'How Are You Uploading Your File?' dropdown box, select "}, {"text": "URL", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Paste the URL made previously into "}, {"text": "File Location", "bold": true}, {"text": ". In the Request Method dropdown menu select "}, {"text": "GET", "bold": true}, {"text": ", otherwise you will get an error."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpvGRMAZ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpvGRMAZ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 5.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The export file from your parent site will load up for the fields to be mapped. Match all fields in the file to Neto database fields except for the Custom "}, {"text": "Website", "bold": true}, {"text": " field which can be ignored."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Update Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "Add New / Update Existing Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpusbMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpusbMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 6.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the option to save the import and name the template appropriately and click "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpsRNMAZ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpsRNMAZ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 7.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The process and template will be created. Click on the import template link to open the template."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Import Method & Schedule", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and scroll down to the Import Schedule dropdown menu. Set this approximately 1 hour later than the previous feed in case there is a delay or backlog on your primary site."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpuscMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VpuscMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Manage Multiple Maropost Commerce Stores Through Import and Export 8.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. This will now send any products on your primary site flagged for your secondary website to be sent through on a daily basis."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Export Stock Levels from Parent Website"}], "data-id": "export-stock-levels-from-parent-website"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock levels need to be updated on your child site more frequently than the full product list to ensure you don't oversell. "code_line", "children": [{"text": "\"[@SKU@]\",\"[%calc [@warehouse_quantity_1@] - [@committed_quantity_1@] /%]\""}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The tag for the Qty-1 is a calculation, which subtracts the committed quantity from the warehouse quantity to leave the QOH, which stock available for purchase."}]}],
